title: senecio beltranii
intro: Senecio beltranii, also known as Beltran's ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to Mexico and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Senecio beltranii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although caution should be exercised due to potential toxicity and the risk of liver damage if ingested in large quantities.
